历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 662, 764, 785, 853, and 788 respectively, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2025, there was a slight recovery compared to 2024 (853→788). Over the past five years, the fluctuation range was approximately 662–853, with a baseline ranking of about 788 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province was 138 students from 2021 to 2022, and 135 students from 2023 to 2025. The 2026 plan remains at 135 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, thus having no significant impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
Beihang University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has steadily risen from 15th in 2021 to 11th in 2025–2026, firmly placing it among the top universities in the country, which strongly attracts high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving the misconduct and academic dishonesty of supervisor Yang Yun, which may slightly inhibit some candidates' willingness to apply. The Douyin popularity ranking is 56th (relatively hot), with overall exposure at a medium-to-high level. No signs of a cutoff anomaly have been observed in historical admission records. The university has 16 A- or above disciplines, including 7 A+ disciplines: Instrument Science and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, Aerospace Science and Technology, Computer Science and Technology, and Software Engineering, indicating top-tier academic strength that highly matches the enrollment majors.
6. [Professional Popularity and Environment] Core enrollment categories at Beihang, such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering, were all rated as highly recommended or recommended in the 2024 professional popularity assessment, with sustained high social attention. The number of Physics Category candidates in Hebei Province increased from approximately 216,000 in 2021 to about 363,000 in 2025, with an estimated 365,000 in 2026, indicating continuous expansion of the candidate pool and intensified competition. The provincial control line (Physics Category undergraduate batch) rose from 412 points in 2021 to 459 points in 2025, showing an upward trend year by year.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Beihang University is located in Beijing, a top-tier engineering institution nationwide, exerting strong regional appeal to Hebei candidates. The university enrolls a relatively large number of students from Hebei Province in the Physics Category (approximately 135), making it one of the main source provinces outside Beijing.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 788, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight increase in the number of Physics Category candidates in Hebei Province, the continuous rise in university rankings, and negative reputation signals, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to the 2025 baseline (competition slightly eases). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 780, with a range of 680–880.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Computer Science and Technology (Top Talent Training Program)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Aerospace Leading Program)
- Artificial Intelligence (Outstanding Talent Training Pilot Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information/Computing and Intelligent Science)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Medical-Engineering Cross Pilot Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Including Mathematics/Physics Top Talent Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace and Astronautics)
- Aircraft Power Engineering (Outstanding Talent Training Pilot Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Sino-French Engineer Institute).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 680–880, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a stretch and Tier 3 majors as a safety. Candidates with rankings better than 680 can prioritize Tier 1 flagship programs such as Computer Science Top Talent Program and Future Aerospace Leading Program. Those with rankings around 780 should focus on Tier 2 majors like Information and Computing and Intelligent Science. Candidates with rankings near 880 should prioritize Tier 3 majors such as Aerospace and Astronautics to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 539, 517, 475, 533, and 409 respectively, showing a fluctuating forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers, intensifying competition). The 2025 ranking of 409 is the best in the past five years, significantly improving by 124 places compared to 2024. The enrollment plan for History Category in Hebei Province was 15 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 21 in 2024, reduced to 11 in 2025, and remains at 11 in 2026, unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beihang University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has continuously risen to 11th in 2025-2026, firmly among the top universities in China. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is significantly negative, mainly involving the mentor Yang Yun's ethics misconduct and academic fraud incident, which may slightly suppress some candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 56th (relatively hot), with overall exposure moderately high. Beihang is known for engineering, and the History Category enrollment majors are Social Science Experimental Class (including Economics, Administrative Management, Law, etc.). In the corresponding discipline evaluations, Law and Applied Economics are not separately rated, but Beihang's overall disciplinary strength is strong.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of Law major in 2024 is differentiated and wait-and-see, with moderate social heat. The number of History Category candidates in Hebei Province increased from approximately 202,000 in 2021 to approximately 244,000 in 2025, estimated at about 245,000 in 2026, with continuous expansion of candidate scale and intensifying competition. The provincial control line (History Category undergraduate batch) rose from 454 points in 2021 to 477 points in 2025, showing an upward trend. Beihang is located in Beijing, which has strong regional attraction for Hebei candidates. The History Category enrollment plan is only 11, with scarce slots and fierce competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 409, unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, slight increase in History Category candidates, continuous rise in university ranking but negative reputation signals, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to the 2025 baseline (competition slightly eases), with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 403, and a range of 303-503.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Social Science Experimental Class (including Law, Administrative Management, Economics majors; including Artificial Intelligence-Administrative Management Dual Degree Program, Law-Artificial Intelligence Dual Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- No other History Category enrollment major tiers available.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Foreign Language Interdisciplinary Talent Training Experimental Class) (including English, Translation majors; including English-Artificial Intelligence, Translation-Artificial Intelligence, English-Finance Dual Degree Programs).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Beihang University only offers two directions of Social Science Experimental Class in Hebei Province's History Category, with an enrollment plan of only 11, extremely limited slots. For rankings within the predicted range of 303-503, it is recommended to aim for the Social Science Experimental Class (Law/Administration/Economics direction) as a sprint target, and the Foreign Language Interdisciplinary direction as a safe choice. Candidates with rankings better than 303 can boldly apply, while those near 503 should carefully evaluate.
